channel.title: Metasploit on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Metasploit on Classroom

item.title: Msfvenom Psh
item.description: Create a Meterpreter reverse shell with PowerShell using MSFVenom — payload generation, listener setup, and session interaction.

item.title: MSFVenom Cheatsheet: Payload Generation & One-Liners Guide
item.description: A complete MSFVenom cheatsheet with one-liner payloads for Windows, Linux, macOS, and web shells. Includes examples for various formats and reverse shells.

item.title: Metasploit Cheat Sheet
item.description: Metasploit Framework cheat sheet — essential commands for exploits, payloads, sessions, meterpreter, and post-exploitation modules.
